rows.notes: Description corrected based on visual inspection ('Porter Salary 1/4 to Mich - 1857'). Amounts taken from gemini-flash. The numeral '20' is visibly written in the shillings column. As 20 shillings exceeds the maximum (19) for the shillings field, it is correctly interpreted as 1 pound, 0 shillings, 0 pence, carrying over the value according to the validation rule. gpt-5-mini's interpretation of £20 was incorrect given the column alignment.
